title: Electoral Disclosure and Funding (Donation Disclosure) Amendment Act 2025
text: Electoral Disclosure and Funding (Donation Disclosure) Amendment Act 2025 An Act to amend the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 [Royal Assent 16 April 2025] Be it enacted by Her Excellency the Governor of Tasmania, by and with the advice and consent of the Legislative Council and House of Assembly, in Parliament assembled, as follows: 1. Short title This Act may be cited as the Electoral Disclosure and Funding (Donation Disclosure) Amendment Act 2025 . 2. Commencement This Act commences on the day on which this Act receives the Royal Assent, or 1 July 2025, whichever is the later. 3. Principal Act In this Act, the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 is referred to as the Principal Act. 4. The amendments effected by this section have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 . 5. The amendments effected by this section have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 . 6. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 . 7. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 . 8. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 . 9. The amendments effected by this section have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 . 10. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 . 11. The amendments effected by this section have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 . 12. The amendments effected by this section have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 . 13. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Electoral Disclosure and Funding Act 2023 . 14. Repeal of Act This Act is repealed on the three hundred and sixty fifth day from the day on which all of the provisions of this Act commence. from top.html -->
